title: Evangelion 20 Special Edition Soundtrack Booklet
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion 2.0 Special Edition Soundtrack Booklet             Quote Post by alexprevity » Sat Dec 22, 2012 5:17 pm Hey! So, I was reading the Wikipedia page for Music of Neon Genesis Evangelion , and I came across this little bit of information about the special edition of the Evangelion 2.0 soundtrack: ...a special edition (catalog number KICA 983/4) that features an additional disc containing unedited versions of the music and a twenty-page booklet with commentary by Shirō Sagisu, as well as sheet music excerpts.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Dec 22, 2012 6:21 pm I know that one of the ripped versions of the soundtrack floating around on the Interwebs had scans included, but I can't remember which release it was. I don't have it anymore, either, having lost it to an HD crash, so if anyone else happens to know...

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sat Dec 22, 2012 6:53 pm My copy of the 2.0 soundtrack has the bonus disk and a 28-page booklet (counting the covers and all) with loads of Japanese text and some music examples, and an orange cardboard slipcase. The catalogue number is MICA-1095-6, and I have since discovered that it is a Taiwanese bootleg. None the less, would a scan of the booklet be of interest?

[]:             Quote Post by alexprevity » Sat Dec 22, 2012 7:41 pm pwhodges wrote: My copy of the 2.0 soundtrack has the bonus disk and a 28-page booklet (counting the covers and all) with loads of Japanese text and some music examples, and an orange cardboard slipcase. The catalogue number is MICA-1095-6, and I have since discovered that it is a Taiwanese bootleg. None the less, would a scan of the booklet be of interest?

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Mon Dec 24, 2012 1:55 pm Here you are (30MB, 'cos 600x600 scans - higher resolution than the printing...)

[]:             Quote Post by alexprevity » Mon Dec 24, 2012 1:57 pm I'm getting a 404!

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Mon Dec 24, 2012 1:58 pm Fixed - I had a typo which I corrected within a minute or so, but you were too fast!

[]:             Quote Post by alexprevity » Mon Dec 24, 2012 2:05 pm Haha, sorry about that! But, this is perfect and beautiful! I can already tell it's going to be a goldmine of information. Once I get it translated, I will upload it here for you all, or maybe the admins can lump it in with the other stickied goods. Thank you a ton! If there was a way to give you a thousand virtual kudos, I would. EDIT: Okay, so I'm pretty sure I suck at translating. If I get this sucker transcribed to text, do you any of you guys care enough to take a stab at it? I have a few Japanese friends, but I'd hate to rope them into it.

[]:             Quote Post by Son of Eva » Sat Jun 13, 2015 3:12 am ヽ(o^―^o)ﾉ Hi! Could you share those sheet music excerpts? I'm creating a cover for "Fate" but I'm lost on a couple of measures that I'd prefer to have accuracy, so I'm looking online for ref.
